{{Quote|…and the baby, we call her Bu.|[[Ganeed]] to [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]|<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace]]''</ref>}}
'''Bu''' was a baby [[Senali (species)|Senali]], daughter of [[Garth (Senali)|Garth]] and [[Ganeed]], and niece of the [[King/Legends|King]] [[Meenon]] of [[Senali]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace]]'' {{1st}}
